name: MeshItemEnumerator
summary: The MeshItemEnumerator class allows to loop through the catalog mesh items.

methods.name: GetSize
methods.summary: Returns the total amout of items.

methods.name: MoveNext
methods.summary: Moves to the next item in the enumerator.

methods.name: Reset
methods.summary: Resets the enumerator to the beginning.

methods.name: SelectMeshItem
methods.signature: public static MeshItem SelectMeshItem(string Name, string Grade)
methods.summary: Selects a mesh item in the mesh database with the given name and grade.

params.name: Name
params.doc: The name of the mesh item to select.

params.name: Grade
params.doc: The grade of the mesh item to select.

returns.doc: The first MeshItem that matches the conditions.

properties.name: Current
properties.summary: Returns a mesh item instance of the current element.
